system.description: These iron implements can be used to anchor a rope in place on their sturdy prongs. The hook may be thrown or attached manually by a climber. A successful attack throw is required to throw a grappling hook onto a target. The attack throw suffers a -2 penalty if the target is 11  30 away, a -5 penalty if the target is 31  50 away, and a -10 penalty if the target is 50 to 100 away. A grappling hook thrown against a creature functions as a bola (p. XX) but suffers a -2 penalty to attack throws.
